examples: We can also protect the reefs by protecting the surrounding ecosystems, like mangrove forests and seagrass beds.
Mangrove root systems have the ability to absorb and well trap sediments and pollutants in water that flows through them before they enter the ocean.
After the wide-open water of the estuary, the mangrove forest feels eerie and magical.
The lower part is a mangrove forest and the rest has only modest elevation changes.
